chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-692 of 2021 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.02.2022. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M. A. No.3143/2021. 3. For orders on maintainability of Main Case. Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. --------------------- After going through the statement filed on behalf of S.S.P, Larkana, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he will not press the disposal of the instant constitutional petition on merits provided the pension case of the petitioner is disposed of by the respondents in accordance with law within 30 days. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
